name: kokoro-tts
title: Kokoro TTS
description: Local Kokoro 82M text-to-speech — voice picker, hotkeys, no cloud.
author: dm-chase

preferences.name: backend
preferences.title: TTS Backend
preferences.description: Auto prefers Kokoro if its local server is reachable, otherwise uses the macOS system voice (no install needed).

data.title: Auto — Kokoro if available, otherwise System

preferences.name: serverUrl
preferences.title: Kokoro server URL
preferences.description: Where your local Kokoro server is listening (only relevant when the Kokoro backend is in use).

commands.name: speak-selection
commands.title: Speak Selection
commands.subtitle: Kokoro TTS
commands.description: Read the currently selected text aloud

commands.name: speak-clipboard
commands.title: Speak Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Kokoro TTS
commands.description: Read the current clipboard contents aloud

commands.name: speak-text
commands.title: Speak Text
commands.subtitle: Kokoro TTS
commands.description: Type or paste text to read aloud, with voice + speed override

commands.name: voices
commands.title: Voices
commands.subtitle: Kokoro TTS
commands.description: Browse voices, preview, and choose a default
